description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-date-picker`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-date-picker/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 28 defects — 2 P0, 8 P1, 18 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] 1: ARIA Grid: Missing `role="row"` — Structure Violation
- [ ] [P0] 2: Day Cells: `aria-pressed` Used Instead of `aria-selected`

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-date-picker
